mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into sms_home_recommend_subject (subject_id, subject_name, recommend_status, sort) values (#{subjectId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{subjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{recommendStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into sms_home_recommend_subject
subject_id,
subject_name,
recommend_status,
sort,

#{subjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update sms_home_recommend_subject
subject_id = #{subjectId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
subject_name = #{subjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
recommend_status = #{recommendStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
